message:
test(harness): add conformance harnesses for printf/scanf/wide_string/wide_memory

Add 4 conformance test harnesses validating fixture schema and coverage:
- printf_conformance: 12 tests (flags, length modifiers, specifiers, snprintf)
- scanf_conformance: 14 tests (specifiers, scansets, suppression, width, EOF)
- wide_string: 9 tests (wcslen, wcscmp, wcscpy)
- wide_memory: 11 tests (wmemcpy, wmemmove, wmemset, wmemcmp, wmemchr)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
